files.contents:
Lab Technician

Precision. Safety. Results.

# Lab Technician Landing Page

A minimal, production-ready landing page for a lab technician. Single HTML page served by Express with a health endpoint, plain CSS/JS, and automated tests.

## Prerequisites
- Node.js >= 16

## Install
- npm install

## Run
- PORT=3000 npm start
  - Defaults to port 3000 if PORT is not set.
  - Visit http://localhost:3000

## Development
- npm run dev
  - Uses nodemon to reload on changes.

## Test
- npm test
  - Verifies the hero title exists in index.html and /health returns {"status":"ok"}.

## Project Structure
- server.js: Express server (static host + /health + SPA fallback)
- public/: Static assets (index.html, styles.css, app.js)
- tests/: Jest tests

notes: Run the server with npm start. Optionally set PORT to override the default 3000.
Tests can be run with npm test.
